summary: All new features tested and verified: 2FA (TOTP) enable/verify/disable/login, Password Reset flow, Enhanced Landing Page (Architecture Graph, Deploy Terminal, Enterprise Compliance), Credit Meter on Dashboard, and Security tab on Settings page.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/2fa/enable returns QR code, secret (32 chars), and 8 backup codes
Backend: POST /api/auth/2fa/verify validates TOTP code and enables 2FA
Backend: POST /api/auth/2fa/verify rejects invalid codes with 400
Backend: POST /api/auth/login returns requires_2fa=true when 2FA is enabled
Backend: POST /api/auth/login-2fa authenticates with valid TOTP code
Backend: POST /api/auth/login-2fa returns 401 for invalid TOTP code
Backend: POST /api/auth/2fa/disable works with valid code
Backend: POST /api/auth/reset-password/request returns 200 (prevents email enumeration)
Backend: POST /api/auth/reset-password/request works for non-existent emails (security)
Backend: POST /api/auth/reset-password/confirm returns 400 for invalid token
Backend: POST /api/auth/reset-password/confirm validates password length
Frontend: Landing page loads with Architecture and Security nav links
Frontend: Architecture Graph section with 7 animated agent cards visible
Frontend: Deploy Terminal animation section with live deployment simulation
Frontend: Enterprise Compliance section with 3 compliance cards (SOC 2, GDPR, Security-First)
Frontend: Login page shows 'Forgot password?' link
Frontend: /forgot-password page loads with email form and 'Send Reset Link' button
Frontend: /reset-password page shows 'Invalid Link' when no token provided
Frontend: Dashboard shows Credit Meter component (10/10 credits, STARTER plan)
Frontend: Settings page has Security tab with 2FA setup card and 'Enable 2FA' button
critical_code_review_comments: 2FA implementation uses pyotp correctly with TOTP standard (RFC 6238)
Password reset prevents email enumeration by always returning 200
Reset token expiration (1 hour) properly enforced
CreditMeter component correctly calculates remaining credits and shows color-coded bars
TwoFactorSetup component handles enable/verify/disable states properly
seed_data_creation: Created test users with TEST_ prefix for 2FA and password reset testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features from cursorcode.zip merge tested and working: 2FA (TOTP with pyotp), Password Reset flow, Enhanced Landing Page sections (Architecture Graph with 7 agents, Deploy Terminal animation, 3 Enterprise Compliance cards), Credit Meter on Dashboard header, Security tab with TwoFactorSetup component in Settings. Test user: test@cursorcode.ai / Test123456!
mocked_apis_note: No APIs are mocked - 2FA, password reset, and credit meter are all real implementations. SendGrid email may not send without API key configured, but reset token is stored in DB.
